About the Project

Oberoi Villas — Tiwariganj, Lucknow

Oberoi Villas is a thoughtfully designed residential development in Tiwariganj, Lucknow — one of the city's rapidly growing localities with excellent connectivity and established social infrastructure. The project is positioned just 500 metres from Faizabad Road (Ayodhya Road), placing it at the intersection of convenience and calm.

Situated opposite CMS School and in close proximity to BBD University, the location is ideal for families who value quality education at their doorstep. The project sits within a well-established neighbourhood with schools, hospitals, and daily-need amenities all within easy reach.

The development offers ready-to-move 3 BHK duplexes and row houses in a secure gated colony — allowing buyers to move in immediately without the uncertainty of a construction-linked plan. Each unit sits on a 1,000 sq.ft. plot with a generous 1,650 sq.ft. of built-up construction area, offering ample space across two floors for a growing family.

Core infrastructure includes a landscaped park, a complete sewer line network, and gated security — giving residents the confidence of a well-managed, complete community. Bank loans are typically available for eligible buyers, making the transition to ownership smooth.

Why Choose This Project

Key Highlights

Ready to Move

No construction wait — units are complete and ready for immediate possession. Move in on the day of your choice without any delays.

Gated Community

A secure, fully gated colony with controlled-access entry — giving residents peace of mind and a safe environment for families.

500m from Faizabad Road

Just 500 metres from the Faizabad Road (Ayodhya Road) — one of Lucknow's principal arterials, connecting you to the city and beyond with ease.

Opposite CMS School

Directly opposite CMS School and near BBD University — an exceptional address for families seeking top-quality education within walking distance.

Spacious 3 BHK Duplex

1,650 sq.ft. of well-designed living space on a 1,000 sq.ft. plot — offering the room and privacy of a duplex or row house for the modern family.

Bank Loans Available

Eligible buyers can avail home loans from leading banks — making the purchase process straightforward and accessible for salaried and self-employed buyers alike.

Park & Green Spaces

A landscaped park within the gated community — providing a serene outdoor retreat for children and adults alike, right at your doorstep.

Complete Infrastructure

Sewer line, internal roads, and civic infrastructure fully in place — no waiting for utilities. A move-in-ready community with all essentials covered.
